mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AUTHOR_NM) AS RNUM , COALESCE(AUTHOR_CODE , '' ) AS AUTHOR_CODE , COALESCE(AUTHOR_NM , '' ) AS AUTHOR_NM , COALESCE(AUTHOR_DC , '' ) AS AUTHOR_DC , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(AUTHOR_CREAT_DE, '%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%s') , '' ) AS AUTHOR_CREAT_DE , ( SELECT IF( COUNT(B.AUTHOR_CODE) > 0, '생성', '미생성' ) FROM LETTNMENUCREATDTLS B WHERE B.AUTHOR_CODE = A.AUTHOR_CODE ) AS chkYeoBu FROM LETTNAUTHORINFO A WHERE 1=1
AND AUTHOR_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND AUTHOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND AUTHOR_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) A1

SELECT A.MENU_NO AS MENU_NO , A.MENU_ORDR AS MENU_ORDR , A.MENU_NM AS MENU_NM , A.UPPER_MENU_NO AS UPPER_MENU_ID , (SELECT count(B.MENU_NO) FROM LETTNMENUCREATDTLS B WHERE B.MENU_NO = A.MENU_NO AND B.AUTHOR_CODE = #{authorCode}) AS CHK_YEO_BU FROM LETTNMENUINFO A WHERE A.MENU_NO > 0 ORDER BY A.MENU_ORDR
